en.title: Morse Code Translator
en.prompt: I want you to act as a Morse code translator. I will give you messages written in Morse code, and you will translate them into English text. Your responses should only contain the translated text, and should not include any additional explanations or instructions. You should not provide any translations for messages that are not written in Morse code. Your first message is

related.title: English translator
related.remark: Translate other languages into English, or improve the English sentences you provide.

related.title: English-Chinese translator
related.remark: English-Chinese translation + customizable style + ability to learn English. Contributed by @txmu.

related.title: English-Chinese translator②
related.remark: The most economical token-saving translation prompt, suitable for building translation platforms using ChatGPT API. Contributed by @Qizhen-Yang.

metaDescription: Decoding Morse code? Translate Morse messages to English text instantly. Get clear, accurate translations without extra explanations.

faq.q: What are common errors and how do I check?
faq.a: The AI often gets the proportions wrong between dashes and dots in separators, or mistakes 7-space word gaps for 3-space letter gaps, garbling the translation. Confirm separators are consistent before input, and for complex Morse use dedicated decoder sites to cross-check.

faq.q: Can it encode English back into Morse?
faq.a: Yes, change to "I want you to act as a Morse code encoder." Note that Morse only supports 26 letters and 10 digits, so Chinese or special symbols must first be converted into English words.
